mechanics.excerpt: Undercover agents and criminals looking for potent and concealable weapon are the microgrenade' biggest fans Mlssile Launchers Personal missile launchers, though bulky, are cheap; OCCU rate and effective ati-armor weapons Light AntfVehicle Weapon (LAW): This inexpensive and dis posable one shot weapon offers infantry tighting chance against armored adversaries; iS lighter and easier to fire than the SRM launcher; making the most widely used anti-vehicle weapon_ SRM Launcher: The heavy SRM launcher fires the same ammunition as vehicle and Mech-class SRM launchers It is very encumbering: and each missile weighs in at 10 kilograms; virtually requiring soldiers to set up in a emplacement and have vehicle close at hand to haul its ammunition; Machine Guns Dependable inexpensive and easily repaired, heavy machine euns are the support weapon of choice for infantry- men; Portable Machine Gun: Light enough to be carried by sin- gle trooper; can be found in almost every infantry squad alongside the grenade launcher: consumes horrendous amount of ammunition requiring virtually constant supply (carried either in vehicle by other squad members}, Support Machlne Gun: Mounted on vehicles ad emplace ment turrets this is too massive for single trooper t0 carry: extraordinary range tor - slug throwing weapon and fires round that can damage even heavily armored vehicles The recoil Demolitlons Demolition charges are designed to cut through or destroy buildings ad vehicles_ The explosions themselves are relative ly contained, as any blast energy not directed at the target' considered wasted energy: As such_ the AP and damage reduced for every half-meter from the point of impact; rather than every meter as with other blast weapons, 137
